Package org.opentcs.access.to.model

Class LocationCreationTO.Layout

java.lang.Object
org.opentcs.access.to.model.LocationCreationTO.Layout
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
LocationCreationTO
public static class LocationCreationTO.Layout extends Object implements Serializable
Contains information regarding the graphical representation of a location.

  • Constructor Details

    • Layout

      public Layout()
      Creates a new instance.

    • Layout

      public Layout(CoupleCreationTO labelOffset, LocationRepresentationTO locationRepresentation, int layerId)
      Creates a new instance.
      Parameters:
      labelOffset - The offset of the label's location to the point's position (in lu).
      locationRepresentation - The location representation to use.
      layerId - The ID of the layer on which the location is to be drawn.

    • getLabelOffset

      public CoupleCreationTO getLabelOffset()
      Returns the offset of the label's position to the location's position (in lu).

      public LocationCreationTO.Layout withLabelOffset(CoupleCreationTO labelOffset)
      Creates a copy of this object, with the given X label offset.

      labelOffset - The value to be set in the copy.
      Returns:
      A copy of this object, differing in the given value.
